channel.title: OnThisDay
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnThisDay, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Today in History for 21st February 2026
item.description: Historical Events 1173 - Pope Alexander III canonizes Thomas Becket, Archbishop of Canterbury 1782 - US Congress resolves establishment of a US mint 1...

item.title: The FBI Crime Lab opens its doors for business | November 24, 1932 | HISTORY
item.description: The crime lab that is now referred to as the FBI Scientific Crime Detection Laboratory officially opens in Washington...
